name: Overloaded Brain Grenade
description:
Activate 2 Interact

It's possible for a desperate alchemist to rig the brain container of a defeated alchemical golem to create a volatile (if unusual) explosive. You throw the grenade up to 60 feet, and it explodes, dealing ,3d6[mental]]{3d6 fire damage and 3d6 mental damage} in a ( save).

On a critical failure, a creature takes ] damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a brain case harvested from alchemical golem
